title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Parle Products - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Parle Products - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
